user.title: Smart Habits
user.description: Smart Habits analyses your Home Assistant history to discover your real usage patterns and suggests automations based on them. Select how many days of history to analyse.

data_description.lookback_days: Number of days of Recorder history to use when detecting patterns.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one Smart Habits instance is allowed.

init.title: Smart Habits Options
init.description: Adjust how Smart Habits analyses your history.

data_description.lookback_days: Number of days of Recorder history to use when detecting patterns.
data_description.analysis_interval: How often to automatically re-analyse Recorder history for new patterns.
data_description.sequence_window: Time window in seconds for detecting temporal sequences (Device A activates then Device B activates).
